statement: In every magma, Equation 2022 (`x = (y * (z * w)) * (z * w)`) implies Equation 1233 (`x = x * (((x * y) * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0194
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op z w)) (op z w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op x y) y) z))
